data.title: Rough Around the Edges

commerce.title: BODi Membership Required
commerce.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

seo.title: Rough Around the Edges
seo.description: Train with a BADASS crew of professional stuntwomen.

trainers.bioBodi: Amy has been studying martial arts her entire life, which is only natural when your dad is an MMA champion. All of those years of practice are given the spotlight in each Rough Around the Edges class she guides. She'll motivate you to reach your toughest goals through persistence and perseverance.

Anisha applies the same attention to detail to fitness as she does being a stuntwoman— every little workout counts! For an added boost of fun in class, she adds some dance moves to each workout she leads, drawing from her extensive background in dance and touring with T-Pain.

After competing in various martial arts tournaments across the country, Caitlin caught the eye of none other than Jackie Chan. From there she became a natural stunt woman. Her tip for keeping herself motivated comes from her competitive streak: "You have to keep getting better because everyone else out there is getting better as well."

Corinne began her career as a police officer in Canada, and discovered her skill for fighting on the police boxing team. From there she left the force and began a successful career as a professional boxer and, later, a host on ESPN. And when we say successful, we mean she became the No. 2-ranked female boxer in the world.

Fitness has been a lifelong love for Michelle. She started gymnastics at the age of 3, and martial arts at 10. When you show up to a workout with Michelle, she'll leave you feeling pumped, positive, and ready for more.

After getting into Taekwondo as a kid and, later, sport karate, Thekla got into stunt work. Not all stunts are flips and tricks though, she tells us: "I did have to learn how to ride a Segway for a stunt once." She brings the same fun and charisma with which she attacks a Segway to every workout!"

data.descriptionShort: Train with a BADASS crew of professional stuntwomen.
data.descriptionLong: Get ready to train with a team of professional stuntwomen with the actual moves they use to get ready for their roles. It’s demanding and it’s designed to work your body in ways you’ve never worked it before, but the results are worth it.

modules.categories: HIIT, MMA Training, Muscle Building, Strength, Cardio, Core

modules.title: Is Rough Around the Edges Right For Me?
modules.content: Rough Around The Edges is an intense, results-driven series of workouts led by a team of professional stuntwomen and inspired by the moves they use to train for their roles.   Designed for anyone who wants to get in great shape  and get inspired to become best versions of themselves they can possibly be. If you have a passion to be stronger, inside and out, then RATE is an ideal program for you!

modules.title: What Are The Workouts Like?
modules.content: Each Rough Around The Edges workout challenges your body in a different way. You’ll use kickboxing combos to burn fat, karate-inspired exercises to sculpt your core, superhero moves to build incredible strength, and much more. Just show up and work hard, and you’ll be rewarded with amazing confidence and results.

modules.title: Tools + Equipment
modules.content: For some workouts, a set of dumbbells is recommended. A mat is optional.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

modules.title: Michelle B. lost 17 lbs., 12.75"
modules.testimonial: After completing Rough Around the Edges, my clothes are fitting better and my waist definitely looks slimmer. I feel stronger by the day!
modules.disclaimer: Results vary depending on starting point and effort. Results achieved in 60 days using Rough Around the Edges. Michelle B. received a free subscription to Openfit.
